findings.description: Overwrites Layout Shell with /logs-only single-route app. Same rebase issue as #20.

Adds 11 non-Leo colors: #10B981, #34D399, #4ADE80, #6EE7B7, #818CF8, #A7F3D0, #D1FAE5, #DC2626, #F472B6, #F97316, #FB923C. These are standard Tailwind palette values not from design-tokens.json. Violates .agent-rules.md design constraint. Remove after rebase.
Named Logs.tsx, stub in main is LogsPage.tsx. Rename after rebase.

positive: server/api/logs.js reads from real filesystem paths (events.ndjson, decision-log.jsonl)
Virtual scroll pattern correct for large log sets
action: Rebase onto main, resolve conflicts, remove non-Leo tailwind additions, populate LogsPage.tsx
